programme.title: Footloose
programme.desc: A city kid moves to a small town where rock 'n' roll and dancing had been banned, and his rebellious spirit shakes up the populace.

programme.title: Shutter Island
programme.desc: Up-and-coming U.S. marshal Teddy Daniels is assigned to investigate the disappearance of a patient from Boston's Shutter Island Ashecliffe Hospital.

programme.title: E8 - Siblings Month: Helping Hands!
programme.desc: The siblings are lending their helping hands! When Mom needs a nap, Jack & Jill take care of Baby John, playing games & putting on a show. Then, the family works together to build a giant sand turtle for a sandcastle competition! The helping continues as the kids chase a stinky skunk out of the house & Baby John learns to be like his big brother Jack. Plus, Jill reads a pirate story to her brothers for a fun adventure!

programme.title: E1 - A Day with Nina's Family
programme.desc: Spend a fun-filled day with Nina & her amazing family! First, Nina & her siblings learn all about how things fly as they dream of soaring through the sky like their dad, who is a pilot! Then, it's time for a yummy adventure in the kitchen as Nina & her Abuelita (grandma) decide to make a traditional Mexican breakfast for everyone. The family fun continues as they go on a scavenger hunt for colorful flowers & work together to help the magical Star Star get back into the sky!

programme.title: E3 - A Sick Trick, A Spider, A Bump & A Fly!
programme.desc: The Minibods are dealing with a sick trick, a spider, a bump & a fly! First, Jeff is sick, but after he recovers, he misses the attention & pretends he's still unwell! Then, Fuse is woken up by spooky noises in the night & must put on a brave face for Lulu to investigate. His bravery is tested again when he finds a spider in his gym & doesn't know how to get it out. The chaos ends when Pogo can't sleep & has to deal with a very noisy fly!

programme.title: E1 - Learn & Dance with JJ's Animal Pals!
programme.desc: It's a learning dance party with JJ's animal pals! First, learn all about vowels with the fun & silly song 'Apples & Bananas.' Then, get ready to count as you dance with dinosaurs & countdown from five to one. The learning continues as you guess what sounds different animals make & bounce like rabbits, frogs & kangaroos on a trampoline! Plus, you can even learn to sing 'Itsy Bitsy Spider' entirely in Spanish with Nina!

programme.title: E1 - Siblings Month: Outdoor Adventures!
programme.desc: Join JJ & his siblings for outdoor adventures! First, JJ wants to race his pedal coupe like his siblings race their monster trucks! Then, cool off on a hot summer day with a homemade water park in the backyard. The outdoor fun continues as they search for sea creatures by the bay, dance with ants & ladybugs in the garden & have a silly time with a magical Bananaphone that makes everyone dance!

programme.title: E1 - Orphle's Big Day of Trouble!
programme.desc: It's a big day of trouble, all thanks to Orphle! First, he uses a Multicolour Cloner to make different colored clones of himself, & it's up to Mila & Morphle to track them all down before they cause too much chaos. Then, when the friends are playing in a cardboard castle, Orphle mistakenly thinks they don't want to play with him & attacks it! From stealing a treasure map to teaming up with Winston, Orphle is causing trouble all day!

programme.title: E1 - Orphle's Big Day of Trouble!
programme.desc: It's a big day of trouble, all thanks to Orphle! First, he uses a Multicolour Cloner to make different colored clones of himself, & it's up to Mila & Morphle to track them all down before they cause too much chaos. Then, when the friends are playing in a cardboard castle, Orphle mistakenly thinks they don't want to play with him & attacks it! From stealing a treasure map to teaming up with Winston, Orphle is causing trouble all day!

programme.title: E4 - Baby John's Family Are His Heroes!
programme.desc: Baby John thinks his family members are the best heroes! He really loves & admires his dad, & wants to copy everything he does to be just like him. His big brother Jack is a hero, too, & is always willing to help his little brother & teach him new things. After Mom's cupcakes go missing, Baby John dresses up as a police officer to find out who took them, interviewing each of his family member heroes!

programme.title: E7 - Messy Guest, Cracked, Hoppy & Teddy!
programme.desc: The Minibods are dealing with a messy guest, a cracked egg, a hoppy friend & a ruined teddy! Jeff meets a cute but very messy Floofer & has to learn to live with his new friend's untidy habits. Then, Lulu finds a colorful egg, & when it cracks, a cute chick hatches that she doesn't want to let go! The challenges continue as Newt tries to nurse an injured Oddfrog back to health & Pogo feels guilty after accidentally ruining Newt's teddy bear-shaped hedge.

programme.title: E3 - Sky High & Super Fun Adventures
programme.desc: Get ready for sky-high & super fun adventures with JJ & his friends! First, Astronauts JJ & Mimi blast off into space, soaring past stars & planets before landing on the moon for a cheesy snack! When Boba loses his special balloon, the friends set off in a hot air balloon craft for a chase of a lifetime. The action continues as JJ & Wally train to be firefighters, but Wally's goofing around turns him into the one who needs saving!

programme.title: E3 - Let's Sing, Dance and Play!
programme.desc: It's time to sing, dance & play at Lellobee City Farm! The fun starts in the Boogie Barn where Grandma Mei teaches Ella, Rishi & all the cute animals a brand new alphabet song. Then, it's time to get active as Mei leads a high-energy exercise dance for all the kids & animals! The day ends with a fun 'who can make the biggest splash?' competition in the inflatable swimming pool, where even Pablo the pig & Heidi the horse join in!

programme.title: E4 - Baby John's Family Are His Heroes!
programme.desc: Baby John thinks his family members are the best heroes! He really loves & admires his dad, & wants to copy everything he does to be just like him. His big brother Jack is a hero, too, & is always willing to help his little brother & teach him new things. After Mom's cupcakes go missing, Baby John dresses up as a police officer to find out who took them, interviewing each of his family member heroes!

programme.title: E1 - Baby John's Big Book of Safety!
programme.desc: Open up Baby John's Big Book of Safety & learn along with him! First, the family learns they must remember their helmets to stay safe on a fun family bike ride. Then, it's time for a trip to the beach, where Mom & Dad teach the kids how to have fun & stay safe as they enjoy the sun & sand. The safety lessons continue at the pool, where Baby John learns the importance of following the rules when swimming.

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.desc: The 51 Percent is revolving around women and their role in the world. programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Hiiragi Kanade (Fukuchi Momoko) arrives in Noto as a volunteer and unexpectedly ends up launching a community radio station with the local residents. But there's no experience, no budget, and no studio - only a shared desire to bring light back to a town hurt by earthquakes and torrential rain. Once the broadcast begins, there's no turning back. A nonstop entertainment drama where ordinary citizens find themselves becoming stars.

programme.title: E108 - Mika in the Middle
programme.desc: Mika gets a fine lesson on the art of not snitching, but a surprise from Schwoz's Mom might cause her to fail the test.

programme.title: E126 - #BrainCrush
programme.desc: Sam and Cat notice everyone, including their friends, are becoming obsessed with a new phone game, 'Brain Crush.' The game distracts the audience at Cat's one woman show.

programme.title: E103 - Raph Thinks It Through
programme.desc: Raph's strength won't save him when he's caught between the Mechazoids and the notorious street gang known as Purple Dragons! Raph's going to have to use his head to get out of this one!

programme.title: E210 - Party All The Crime
programme.desc: After Chloe's birthday party is cancelled, Max and Phoebe compete to throw her a new one. When Max's time-stopping birthday gift falls into the wrong hands, he must work with Phoebe to stop some party poopers from ruining Chloe's birthday.

programme.title: E305 - Miles Sells His Soul
programme.desc: In an effort to help Mika defeat her rival in a riff-off, Miles sells his soul to a suave demon who lives in The Man's Nest Abyss Room. Captain Man must face the demon in a Ukulele-Log-Rolling competition in order to get all the kids' souls back.

programme.title: E202 - Super Stars / Now Museum, Now You Don't
programme.desc: In an alternate universe, the Star family is a team of superheroes, or at least they think they are. // Cecil works a new temp job as a security guard at Lady Upturn's art museum.

programme.title: E213 - The Loudest Mission: Relative Chaos
programme.desc: Bobby fits in great but Ronnie Anne struggles with the smothering nature of their relatives. Little do they know, their mother has a secret motive.

programme.title: E235 - Library Cards
programme.desc: When Patrick discovers the pineapple's library, SpongeBob introduces him to the wonderful world of book learning!

programme.title: E115 - Cover Girls / Save the Date
programme.desc: When all 10 of Lincoln’s sisters ask him to cover for them on the same day, Lincoln has his hands full. // Bobby and Lori go on a double date with Lincoln and Bobby’s little sister, Ronnie Anne.

programme.title: E210 - Party All The Crime
programme.desc: After Chloe's birthday party is cancelled, Max and Phoebe compete to throw her a new one. When Max's time-stopping birthday gift falls into the wrong hands, he must work with Phoebe to stop some party poopers from ruining Chloe's birthday.

programme.title: E111 - #MommaGoomer
programme.desc: Goomer's mom is coming to visit but has no idea that her son is an MMA fighter. Dice enlists the help of Sam and Cat to help convince Goomer's mom that Goomer is a high school teacher.

programme.title: E807 - Europe Road Trip: A Bite of Transylvania / Europe Road Trip: Greece is the Word
programme.desc: When the Louds' bus gets a flat tire, they're invited to stay the night in a spooky couple's mysterious castle. // During a tour of the Parthenon, Lincoln puts on a soldier's helmet which sends him back to Ancient Greece.

programme.title: E213 - The Loudest Mission: Relative Chaos
programme.desc: Bobby fits in great but Ronnie Anne struggles with the smothering nature of their relatives. Little do they know, their mother has a secret motive.

programme.title: E407 - Big Baby / Don't Smurf a Sound
programme.desc: Papa Smurf accidentally gives Baby Smurf a growth potion. He's now a giant and wreaks havoc in the village. // Gargamel gives Azrael supersonic ears. Suddenly, the Smurfs can't make a noise.

programme.title: E201 - Basic Zipper Merging Etiquette / How to Bag a Beast
programme.desc: The family gets stuck in a traffic jam that leads to all human civility getting thrown out the passenger side window. // Jack and Lily attempt to catch a legendary town fish despite horror stories from townsfolk who have tried and failed before them.

programme.title: E303 - Roadie to Nowhere / A Fridge Too Far
programme.desc: After learning that Chunk was like her in high school, Luna worries her ambition to be a rocker is unrealistic. // When food Lincoln has saved in the fridge gets taken, a territory war in the fridge ensues.

programme.title: E265 - Bubble Bass's Tab / Kooky Cooks
programme.desc: Bubble Bass avoids paying his bill at the Krusty Krab, so SpongeBob and Squidward are sent to collect the cash. // Mr. Krabs makes Spongebob and Squidward cook a fancy meal for Mrs. Puff, but every dish becomes a dispute.

programme.title: E125 - Which Witch is Which? / Get Off My Lawnie

programme.title: E325 - Pups Raise The Paw Patroller
programme.desc: Daring Danny's at it again, luckily the Pups are able to raise their rig after Danny sinks the Paw Patroller.

programme.title: E209 - One Last For The Road / The Little Critters
programme.desc: The Barbababies love bedtime stories, except if they are always the same... // Barbabelle had a restless night because of all the insects!

programme.title: E220 - The Crew Builds A Post Office / The Crew Builds A Super Farm Animal Wash
programme.desc: Builder Cove needs a post office! But when construction gets squirrely, it's up to the pups to find a construction solution. // Rubble & Crew use their construction skills to convert the super car wash and clean Farmer Zoe's sticky farm animals.

programme.title: E206 - Partly Claudia / Ranita's Magic Stripes
programme.desc: Dora and Boots take Claudia, an energetic young rain cloud, to rain on a dry water slide. / Boots gets a case of Tickle Tail that Ranita the Frog can cure if she gets her magic stripes by helping friends around the Rainforest.

programme.title: E206 - Roadtrip / Tickets / Talent Show
programme.desc: The Rex family go on a road trip through the galaxy to get to Rocket World // Tim & Kai compete to get Terri's spare Space-Land ticket // Tim, Tia & Tommy decide to put on a talent show, but then they can't decide who should go first...

programme.title: E413 - Construction Crew To The Rescue
programme.desc: When Crusher and Pickle are trapped at the top of a tall, rickety tower, Blaze, Stripes and Starla transform into awesome construction vehicles to build a way down.

programme.title: E123 - The Crew Builds A Fountain Show / The Crew Builds A Carousel
programme.desc: When Sierra Sparkle's big concert stage needs some extra sparkle, Rubble & Crew use a construction complication to make a big splash. // Rubble & Crew decide to go big when Grocer Gabriel wants something special built outside of his grocery store.

programme.title: E210 - Too Many Swipers / Bateo's Home Run
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Swiper re-join with his duplicates and make it to Grandma's picnic. / Dora and Boots help Bateo the Bat get to the baseball game in time to play.

programme.title: E204 - Dinerstore
programme.desc: Tim and Tommy help out at the DinerStore.

programme.title: E751 - Playgroup Star
programme.desc: Peppa gets her very first Playgroup Star in school for drawing a wonderful picture of her house!

programme.title: E707 - The Flying Contest
programme.desc: AJ is entering in the Axle City Flying Contest. But when Crusher sends him and Blaze away, they must get back in time for AJ to build his super-cool flying invention!

programme.title: E219 - Rebels / Barbascience
programme.desc: Barbidur and Barbalala become little rebels. // But who are the Barbapapa?

programme.title: E849 - Jukebox
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Granny and Grandpa Pig visit the sailing club where they find a juke box. They have fun dancing to all different types of music.

programme.title: E851 - Mandy Mouse's Birthday
programme.desc: Mandy Mouse has a birthday visit to a cheese theme park with Peppa and her friends. Everything in the park is cheese-themed - Mandy loves cheese!

programme.title: E125 - The Crew Builds A Parking Garage / The Crew Builds A Campsite
programme.desc: The Crew helps with a parking problem when Cafe Carl's ice cream machine brings lots of cars to Builder Cove. // When Rubble's fear of the dark derails the pup's Bark Yard campout, the Crew comes up with an idea to help him enjoy the starry night.

programme.title: E204 - Dinerstore

programme.title: E123 - Barba TV / The Museum
programme.desc: The barbababies are glued to the TV. Since they love it so much, their parents encourage them to make their own shows. // The Barbapapa visit the museum of evolution. On the program: creation of the Earth, Precambrian submarine and... dinosaurs!

programme.title: E220 - The Crew Builds A Post Office / The Crew Builds A Super Farm Animal Wash
programme.desc: Builder Cove needs a post office! But when construction gets squirrely, it's up to the pups to find a construction solution. // Rubble & Crew use their construction skills to convert the super car wash and clean Farmer Zoe's sticky farm animals.

programme.desc: When Digi & Tal's space vacuum breaks it's up to the pups to save Mayor Humdinger from falling space debris. // Humdinger's Cuckoo Clock goes out of control. Ryder and the Pups must rescue Travis and get control of the Cuckoo to save Humdinger.

programme.title: E204 - Dinerstore
programme.desc: Tim and Tommy help out at the DinerStore.

programme.desc: Worm and Ladybird wonder what's going on at Squirrel Club. There's a gorilla playing drums, some helpful ducks, a hot frog, four goats and a hospital run by chicken doctors.

programme.desc: It's fun on the counting train until Naughty Monkey starts to drive! Ethel makes a shape, Frog drops beats with a ribbit song, and Enid turns into anime to chase after a mouse.

programme.desc: A game of 'grannies' is fun, until Bluey and Bingo can't agree on one simple question: Can Grannies dance? Now they need to video call Nana to get the answer.

programme.desc: It's time for Bluey and Bingo to get out of the bath. But Dad has decided not to tell them what to do and gets roped into a game of Burger Shop.

programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: Ben Milbourne finishes his exploration of Tasmania heading out to the rocky waters between Hobart and Bruny Island. Guided by Rob from the Seafood Seduction Tour, Ben experiences the freshest seafood imaginable. Ben concludes his journey overlooking the beautiful South Coast.

programme.title: E4 - Danny Farris
programme.desc: The Internet's best hunting, fishing, and all around outdoor viral videos. Brought to you all in one show with special guest Danny Farris.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: Ben Milbourne pops in at Small-Fry to see his friend Rhys and enjoy a sweet treat before heading to the Huon Valley. Ben is then given a behind-the-scenes tour by James Bender, who works in the family-owned business that supplies the worlds most loved salmon.

programme.title: E1 - The Wild Is Revealing
programme.desc: 10 Teams of 2 Ordinary Americans Join survival expert Bear Grylls On journeys traversing New Zealand’s Treacherous and diverse terrain while competing for $500,000. In The end, Bear Determines who would never “Get Out Alive”, And the first team is eliminated.

programme.title: E4 - Hot Rods and Speed Boats
programme.desc: The King Of The North drag race kicks off with Billy scrambling to prepare his hotrod for its race against Chris and the Jet Truck, in a challenge that will see the loser facing public humiliation.

programme.title: E5 - Second Chances
programme.desc: Ice Pilots NWTNewly minted copilot Jeff Tapper is excited for his first revenue DC-3, but his inexperience shows when he botches the approach and bounces the landing three times, nearly running off the runway. Meanwhile, for new rampie Prefkar Mony to realize his dream of becoming a DC-3 pilot, he needs to first pass the written IATRA test. He’s been studying for months, but on his first attempt, he fails. With the help of pilot/mechanic Chris Staples, Prefkar retakes the test and passes, but his victory celebration is short-lived when he’s blamed for leaving an expensive shipment of medicine marked “Do Not Freeze” in a courier van during a minus 30 weekend. Later, Mikey and Katie decide to find Joe a new dog and choose Muffy, a three-year-old dog from the SPCA who is ready to leave her pups. They bring her back to the hangar for a test drive. Joe brings DC-3 CUE out of retirement to test fly the plane for Buffalo’s summer sked duty and he brings along Jeff—and Muffy—to see if they’re

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 晴原柑九朗作為SDM本部首席代表兼氣象研究員利用智慧與知識，冒著生命危險站在最前線，保護人們的性命免受巨大氣象災害威脅，為使命奮鬥的故事。​

programme.desc: 晴原柑九朗作為SDM本部首席代表兼氣象研究員利用智慧與知識，冒著生命危險站在最前線，保護人們的性命免受巨大氣象災害威脅，為使命奮鬥的故事。​

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: Weird, Wild & Wonderful
programme.desc: Trek across Africa for a peek at the colorful, quirky survival strategies of its animals. See these furry, feathered, and scaled magicians, from flamboyant flamingos to vanishing lizards, find food, elude predators, and find mates against all odds.

programme.title: E10 - Path of the Matriarch
programme.desc: In southern India, the summer is a challenge for Asian elephants who must drink every day. As things dry up, Anura, the matriarch, leads her herd to a distant watering hole. But will she succeed in getting her 3-month-old grandson there in time?

programme.desc: Trek across Africa for a peek at the colorful, quirky survival strategies of its animals. See these furry, feathered, and scaled magicians, from flamboyant flamingos to vanishing lizards, find food, elude predators, and find mates against all odds.

programme.title: E10 - Path of the Matriarch
programme.desc: In southern India, the summer is a challenge for Asian elephants who must drink every day. As things dry up, Anura, the matriarch, leads her herd to a distant watering hole. But will she succeed in getting her 3-month-old grandson there in time?

programme.title: How Can We Prevent Animals Ending Up As Roadkill?
programme.desc: Millions of animals die in collisions with cars each year. How can drivers and automakers prevent such crashes? Plus: Retrofitters in India turn old vehicles into eco-friendly rides, and Flixtrain vs. Deutsche Bahn.

programme.title: Ethiopia's Electric Vehicle Revolution
programme.desc: Electric buses and taxis are reshaping transport in Addis Ababa. Plus: In South Africa, how invasive biomass is transformed into low‑carbon bricks and new jobs.

programme.title: Octopus Under Threat - Searching For Clues Around The Mediterranean
programme.desc: Octopus is considered a delicacy - grilled, boiled, or fried. But rising demand has consequences, and in several regions of Europe, this intelligent cephalopod is already considered overfished.

programme.title: How Can We Prevent Animals Ending Up As Roadkill?
programme.desc: Millions of animals die in collisions with cars each year. How can drivers and automakers prevent such crashes? Plus: Retrofitters in India turn old vehicles into eco-friendly rides, and Flixtrain vs. Deutsche Bahn.

programme.title: Ethiopia's Electric Vehicle Revolution
programme.desc: Electric buses and taxis are reshaping transport in Addis Ababa. Plus: In South Africa, how invasive biomass is transformed into low‑carbon bricks and new jobs.

programme.title: Yes, Madam!
programme.desc: Senior Police Inspector Ng is assigned to work with another lady inspector from Scotland Yard, to investigate the murder of an agent from the Commercial Crime Bureau of London, who was killed because of the evidence he has collected against a crime syndicate in Hong Kong. As the duo try to work around each other's polarized cultures and background, they kick and punch their way through the investigation, leading to 2 small time pickpockets Strepsil and Panadol, who had stolen the passport containing the evidence from the agent before he died. As the bumbling pickpockets try to dodge the assassins in hot pursuit, they eventually turn to the lady cops for help against the crime boss...

programme.title: Aces Go Places III
programme.desc: King Kong is commissioned by a man who claims to be Mr. Bond, special agent from the British Secret Service to recover for the Queen precious stones stolen from her crown which are now in Hong Kong. Back in Hong Kong, a Secret Service man from the Bond Street Headquarters, Mr. Tom Collins, has just arrived to find out a gang of notorious international crooks led by Mr. Bond. Carried out his mission successfully for Mr. Bond, King Kong is summoned by the Governor to assist Collins in retrieving the stolen goods and catch Mr. Bond's gang.

programme.title: American Grandson
programme.desc: A 60-year-old retired teacher in Shanghai promises to look after his American-born grandson who comes to visit him for a short period. They experience the clash of cultures and the inevitable generation gap when getting along...

programme.title: Goodbye Mr. Cool
programme.desc: Ex-convict Dragon works as a waiter after his release from prison. He has no idea that he is now a father, until his six-year-old son greets him 'Dad' upon his release...

programme.title: American Grandson
programme.desc: A 60-year-old retired teacher in Shanghai promises to look after his American-born grandson who comes to visit him for a short period. They experience the clash of cultures and the inevitable generation gap when getting along...

programme.title: Aces Go Places V
programme.desc: White Glove steals terra-cotta warriors and Brother and Sister disguise themselves as the 'ACES' partners King Kong and Kodajak to steal the Sword of Chin Dynasty from White Glove. White Glove swears to revenge on the 'ACES' partners. The real and new 'ACES' partners will join together with police to fight against White Glove.

E6 - Hello, London!
programme.desc: Theresa is a nervous wreck trying to figure out what to pack for her first visit to the UK. Before departing she sages Victoria's house and brings a pre-housewarming gift to encourage her to move out.

programme.title: E3 - Holiday Lasagne
programme.desc: What is red, white and green all over? It's Rachael Ray's lasagne! Rachael shows how to make delicious lasagne by layering sheets of pasta with cime di rapa, ricotta and a ragu sauce.

programme.title: E8 - Tag Team My Bumps
programme.desc: Dr. Lee asks Dr. Zoe to help double-team needle-shy Mary Ann's crusty skin. Isaiah's mom is concerned that he is ignoring the large, growing lump over his lower spine.

programme.title: E8 - Sara And Russell
programme.desc: Sara and Russell are ready to escape the sweltering southern heat and start afresh in a charming fishing village along the East Coast. They're searching for the perfect home to embrace a coastal lifestyle.

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: Every week and in public, Ali Baddou and his group of columnists receive French-speaking artists who are at the heart of current events and move the lines. Space for exchanges, creations and surprises, ''La Grande Galerie Francophone'' celebrates art in all its diversity and shares it with everyone.

programme.title: E14 - The Women Salt Workers
programme.desc: In Guerande's salt marshes ''paludiere'', the feminine form of ''paludier'' or salt worker, long-referred to the salt worker's wife, with no professional status. Today 15% of ''paludieres'' run their own salt business. Dominique, Veronique and Morgane recount how their place in a still predominantly masculine profession, changed over the years.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil S7
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: E8 - From Ile-De-France To Beaujolais
programme.desc: Anne-Catherine Verwaerde travels between two worlds: first, she discovers the Parisian effervescence and its decor trends before heading to the grandiose countryside of Beaujolais.

programme.title: E8 - From Ile-De-France To Beaujolais

programme.title: E22 - Let's Play With Ardoise
programme.desc: In Super-Cute-Land, Kaeloo, Stumpy, Quack-Quack and Mr. Cat play a new game every day. And for that they love nothing better than making up their own rules and asking loads of questions about the world around them: with this lot you can never be sure of what will happen next!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil S7

Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Meurtres En Bearn
programme.desc: A woman is found drowned at the foot of the majestic mountains of the Bearn. Jeanne and Heloise head the investigation. Once close friends, today, as the respective mothers of a young couple torn by a bitter divorce, they hate one another. Somehow they'll have to put their feelings aside!

programme.title: E23 - Nona Source/Bateaux-Mouches/T3 Architecture/Fifties Fashion
programme.desc: An ethical alternative project by LVMH, Nona Source is a resale platform for exceptional fabric. All about the origins of the Bateaux-Mouches. The T3 Architecture practice in Marseilles presents architectural design with an artisanal touch. The very feminine fashion style of the 1950s continues to inspire major designers.

programme.title: Masters Of Cantonese Cuisine
programme.desc: Masters of Cantonese Cuisine is a documentary on Lingnan (Guangdong) delicacies culture, originally created by Shenzhen Satellite TV. This is a brief history of food belonging to the Greater Bay Area, a history of customs and culture that belongs exclusively to Guangdong. The program focus on the local Guangdong delicacies, and led by a “delicacy searcher”, walking through streets in search of local specialities, visiting masters of Cantonese cuisines, and sharing unique tasting commentaries. In the meantime, the reflection on delicacies would be brought back to live studio, and two observers who are proficient in Cantonese cuisine cultures will have chats on tasting. From a spoon and a drop, it will extend to the taste of life and origin of culture embedded in the delicacies.

programme.title: Search for the Big Seven Part 1: The Garden of Eden
programme.desc: When a group of young explorers set off for an adventure in the vast Addo Elephant National Park in South Africa, they get more than they bargained for. They meet buffalo, snakes and a giant lizard big enough to kill a rabbit.

programme.title: Snowball
programme.desc: Vik is annoyed when the snowy weather disrupts his baseball game. But Yoko makes a field of magical snowmen and the game is enjoyed by all!

programme.title: Crystal Caves
programme.desc: When Oto shares his homemade rock candy, the Team sees an odd similarity between the candy and a picture of giant crystals in Oto's rock book. It sounds crazy, but are those giant crystals candy? They set off to Chihuahua, Mexico, to find out!

programme.title: You Ain't Seen Nothing Yeti
programme.desc: The annual winter carnival seems to be in trouble when Addison and Alex's yeti sculpture appears to have been vandalized... perhaps by an actual angry yeti!

programme.title: Socks
programme.desc: Socks are not just to keep your feet warm! Hepi and Briko have some interesting sock-themed ideas.

programme.title: Trip to Central African Republic
programme.desc: Zoe is grumpy about babysitting her little sister. Alim suggests Milo take over, but he protests, saying babysitting is a girl's job. Alim takes them to the Central African Republic, where Yamba shows that among the Aka, men care for babies.

programme.title: Marvellous Medicine and First Aid
programme.desc: What's the best way to organise a first aid kit? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of medicine. Have hands-on fun by making a handy first aid kit, and get to know Al-Zahrawi, ‘the father of surgery' & inventor of a number of surgical instruments.

programme.title: The Buzz on Bugs
programme.desc: Eric learns that insects have a head, thorax, abdomen, antennae, and six legs. He is surprised to find out that spiders are not insects – they are arachnids.

programme.title: Hedgehog
programme.desc: Fleabag and Plop fall in love with the baby hedgehog, and Grandad Badger learns more about these spiky little creatures. Tiny Owl does his best to teach Mommy and Daddy about the hedgehog, but they insist that the spiky thing on TV is a hairbrush.

programme.title: The Magic Number
programme.desc: In 1949, the mathematician D. R. Kaprekar from India came up with the ‘Kaprekar's operation'. Following three fixed steps, the outcome of this operation is always 6174. How is that possible? We'll find out in this exciting episode.

programme.title: Grizzlies of British Columbia
programme.desc: Philippe travels to see the spectacular scenery of British Columbia. He meets some of the animals living in this remote wilderness.

programme.title: Trip to Central African Republic
programme.desc: Zoe is grumpy about babysitting her little sister. Alim suggests Milo take over, but he protests, saying babysitting is a girl's job. Alim takes them to the Central African Republic, where Yamba shows that among the Aka, men care for babies.

programme.title: Marvellous Medicine and First Aid
programme.desc: What's the best way to organise a first aid kit? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of medicine. Have hands-on fun by making a handy first aid kit, and get to know Al-Zahrawi, ‘the father of surgery' & inventor of a number of surgical instruments.

programme.title: Socks
programme.desc: Socks are not just to keep your feet warm! Hepi and Briko have some interesting sock-themed ideas.

programme.title: Towers
programme.desc: The kids are playing with Lego pieces. Oto and Mai start competing to see who can build the tallest tower. But then, something unexpected happens.

programme.title: Mega-Triplet 3000
programme.desc: As a gift, the Triplets receive a machine run by a controller that only the Triplets can use. This can only end in chaos. Is DiktaThor behind all this? Now Sprinter has to get the Triplets to work together in battling DiktaThor and his evil plan.

programme.title: Guts Galore!
programme.desc: Dr. Xand swallows a camera pill to show the incredible villi inside his intestines which absorb the nutrients from food. There's a mind-boosting tip to help in keeping positive, and the Ouchologists are back with more tough medical questions.

programme.title: Okefenokee Doki
programme.desc: The mosquitoes are driving Oto crazy, so he and Doki build a ‘bug trapper' device to solve the problem. To Mundi, this is wrong. What good are pesky flies and mosquitoes, anyway? Mundi makes off with the device in the plane, and hides it in Georgia's Okefenokee Swamp!

programme.title: Giang Brothers: Renowned Circus Performers
programme.desc: The Giang brothers demonstrate how they used their incredible circus skills to achieve a GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the fastest blindfolded ascent and descent of an elevated platform while balancing on each other's head.

programme.title: Guts Galore!
programme.desc: Dr. Xand swallows a camera pill to show the incredible villi inside his intestines which absorb the nutrients from food. There's a mind-boosting tip to help in keeping positive, and the Ouchologists are back with more tough medical questions.

programme.title: Reflecting on Mirror Writing
programme.desc: Mirror, mirror on the wall, can you read Eric's handwriting at all? In this episode Eric explores mirror writing: a reversed way of writing seen on for instance ambulances, where the word 'AMBULANCE' is often written in a mirrored way.

E4 - Taro, The Polynesians' Tuber
programme.desc: Taro, long a staple food in the Polynesian islands, is still cultivated today in every archipelago. In the Australs, its cultivation is the most intensive: taro fields are an integral part of the inhabitants' daily lives.

programme.title: E3 - Unusual Museums
programme.desc: Among the two hundred museums in the city of Paris, some are more confidential than others and belong to brands, associations, or private collectors. Yvan Hallouin explores the most surprising of them.

programme.title: E4 - Taro, The Polynesians' Tuber

programme.title: E44 - Sea Bass Carpaccio With Wild Mustard On Ile De Re
programme.desc: Alessandra Montagne discovers one of Ile de Re's hidden treasures, found among the salt marshes and coastal dunes: wild mustard. On the menu: sea bass carpaccio with wild mustard and a marinade made with local vodka.

programme.title: E21 - In Caen (1)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Caen, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she focuses on the city's famous tripe and its architecture.

programme.title: E9 - A Collector's Garden
programme.desc: In Erlenbach, near Zurich, Hanspeter Burkhard and Arnold Wiessmann have succeeded in concentrating an incredible level of diversity in a surprisingly small space. programme.title: E4 - Taro, The Polynesians' Tuber
programme.desc: Taro, long a staple food in the Polynesian islands, is still cultivated today in every archipelago. In the Australs, its cultivation is the most intensive: taro fields are an integral part of the inhabitants' daily lives.

E33
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.title: E12 - 走進烏江寨的衣食住行
programme.desc: 以「山河即課堂，行走即成長」為主題，由何廣智、劉奕君、李雅娟、孫藝洲、楊超越組成的「非來游學團」踏入內蒙古的草原、沙漠、礦洞與峽谷，完成了一場真實、鮮活、不設腳本的人文探索，開啟一場兼具治愈感與知識性的旅程。

programme.title: E21 - 年度盛典 (上)
programme.desc: 將繼續以「音樂牽線，緣分發聲」為主題，賽制上進行了全面創新升級，帶來更具懸念的緣分匹配設定、更多元的趣味互動模式，以及更動人的團隊默契考驗；匯聚周深、薛之謙、單依純等10位實力歌手與新銳音樂人，通過盲選歌單、即興創作等環碰撞靈感，打造專屬合作舞台！

programme.title: E12 - 走進烏江寨的衣食住行
programme.desc: 以「山河即課堂，行走即成長」為主題，由何廣智、劉奕君、李雅娟、孫藝洲、楊超越組成的「非來游學團」踏入內蒙古的草原、沙漠、礦洞與峽谷，完成了一場真實、鮮活、不設腳本的人文探索，開啟一場兼具治愈感與知識性的旅程。

programme.title: E14 - 總決賽下半場精彩開賽
programme.desc: 聚焦18名來自全國一線「主廚」通過不同對戰形式挑戰各類美食命題，加深著觀眾對廚師技能、主廚職業、飲食文化的多重認知。邀請到四位餐飲界頂級大師董振祥、周曉燕、譚綺文、劉一帆，以及代表食客和經營餐飲店的演員袁弘組成評委團，從不同的角度對主廚創作進行品評，見證主廚形象的誕生。

programme.title: E21 - 年度盛典 (上)

programme.title: E11 - 年度總冠軍之戰
programme.desc: 聚焦「齊舞」體裁，除了“元老”贊多、程瀟回歸，還邀請了楊丞琳、鄭秀妍、高瀚宇、李斯丹妮加盟主理人與原生廠牌組成6支全新的明星限定組合，共同創作不同風格的齊舞作品，通過數輪競技和淘汰，聯合征戰為尊嚴battle到底，爭奪最終的「年度最佳廠牌」榮譽。

programme.title: E1 - Battle Of The Superstores
programme.desc: The founding fathers of the biggest retail stores in the world battle to be the first to innovate, build, and revolutionise the industry. And Sam Walton will construct the world's largest retail empire.

programme.title: E10 - The Sobibor Revolt
programme.desc: During World War II, the Nazis created specialised Death Camps for killing prisoners. At Sobibor, a group of Jews were forced to keep the camp operational, engineered a daring escape that saved many lives.

programme.desc: These stories take survival to the extreme. Like fending off a black bear while dangling off a cliff. Or drifting through shark-infested waters with nothing but a pair of rubber boots to stay afloat.

programme.title: American Dreams in China
programme.desc: 80's. 3 undergraduates share a common ambition - to live the American dream. They establish a tutorial school New Vision, yet the sudden fame are tearing their friendship apart...

programme.title: Handsome Guys
programme.desc: 'Do we lacking anything? We have a house, a truck, and very attractive.' Self-proclaimed tough guy Jae-pil and sexy guy Sang-gu leave an unforgettable first impression on their moving day. Despite becoming special surveillance targets for Police Chief Choi and Officer Nam, they are simply happy to start anew in their European-style dream house. However, happiness is short-lived as they are inadvertently mistaken for kidnappers while trying to rescue Mina, who almost drowns. Meanwhile, uninvited guests looking for Mina start appearing, and an ancient spirit sealed in the basement awakens, surrounding the house with dark energy.

programme.title: The Policeman's Lineage
programme.desc: Major Crimes captain Park Kang-yoon (Cho Jin-woong) receives special funding to carry out his investigations and lives the life of luxury with fancy sedan, high-end condo, designer suits and accessories. A rookie named Min-jae (Choi Woo-shik) joins his unit, who happens to be very by the book. The pair becomes close as they begin investigating a new type of street drug, but Kang-yoon finds out that there is a mole within his unit, who has been compiling a case against him. As Min-jae is shown into the shady world of slush funds being used on cops, he is exposed to a secret organization within the ranks...

programme.title: E2 - Thai Another Day
programme.desc: Hondo, Deacon and Tan team up with Thailand's elite S.W.A.T. team to stop a ruthless drug lord whose heroin operation has far-reaching ties to Los Angeles.

programme.title: E11 - National Finals 1 (Part 1)
programme.desc: The National Finals begin in Las Vegas as the remaining competitors move on to Stage 1 for their chance to win $1 million and become the next American Ninja Warrior.

programme.title: E5 - One Drum
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a mass shooting, Jenny's investigation is derailed when her exhaustion leads to dangerous consequences.
